meta.title: The Other Half of the Risk Equation
meta.description:
Most OT security teams focus on countermeasures and recovery. Few look at the other half of the equation—risk transfer.

This Unsolicited Response from S4x25 breaks down why every security leader should read their cyber insurance policy, know their breach response panel, and build real alignment with risk managers.

If you can’t put a dollar value on risk, someone else will. Probably with fewer greens and more red.
